content:
# Meta-Rule: Multi-Agent Coordination v76

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.74
AND tile_novelty > 0.67
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 4 automated workers
2. Explore high-uncertainty regions
3. Generate 12 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 19.7% improvement in insight quality
